h1.visual_description: All-caps, bold, sans-serif font, left-aligned with significant vertical whitespace above and below.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption, rendered in italics directly below the associated graphic.
Page footer containing the page number followed by a list of authors in uppercase sans-serif font.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Bottom-aligned footer text consisting of a page number and a string of author names.
